Answer:
- Context drift appears when an agent keeps appending retrieved snippets, tool logs, and draft conclusions into the same prompt. The model attends to stale or high-salience text even when the task has shifted,... [E1]
- It also suggests that memory degradation happens when an agent stores unfiltered summaries, guesses, and outdated plans. the memory begins to look authoritative even though it no longer represents the best available evidence.
